glue.connection.CfnAbout: The `AWS::Glue::Connection` resource specifies an AWS Glue connection to a data source. For more information, see [Adding a Connection to Your Data Store](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/glue/latest/dg/populate-add-connection.html) and [Connection Structure](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/glue/latest/dg/aws-glue-api-catalog-connections.html

glue.connection.CatalogId.Description: The ID of the data catalog to create the catalog object in. Currently, this should be the AWS account ID.  To specify the account ID, you can use the `Ref` intrinsic function with the `AWS::AccountId` pseudo parameter. For example: `!Ref AWS::AccountId`.

glue.connection.ConnectionInput.Description: The connection that you want to create.
